title: Update module github.com/openshift/imagebuilder to v1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/openshift/imagebuilder](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder) | `v0.0.0-20250829113700-b78784c6c168` -> `v1.2.17` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopenshift%2fimagebuilder/v1.2.17?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopenshift%2fimagebuilder/v0.0.0-20250829113700-b78784c6c168/v1.2.17?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>openshift/imagebuilder (github.com/openshift/imagebuilder)</summary>

### [`v1.2.17`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.17)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.16...v1.2.17)

#### What's Changed

- Use non-default registries in tests by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​305](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/305)
- Use go.podman.io/storage from monorepo instead of github.com/containers/storage. by [@​jankaluza](https://redirect.github.com/jankaluza) in [#​306](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/306)

#### New Contributors

- [@​jankaluza](https://redirect.github.com/jankaluza) made their first contribution in [#​306](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/306)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.16...v1.2.17>

### [`v1.2.16`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.16)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.15...v1.2.16)

#### What's Changed

- Add a ParseIgnoreReader() by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​299](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/299)
- Set empty `TARGETVARIANT` and `BUILDVARIANT` by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [#​301](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/301)
- Bump dependencies by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​302](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/302)
- Add arm64 in Travis by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​303](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/303)
- Inherit ARGs across stages that are based other stages by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​304](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/304)

#### New Contributors

- [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) made their first contribution in [#​301](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/301)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.15...v1.2.16>

### [`v1.2.12`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.12)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.11...v1.2.12)

#### What's Changed

- shellWord.processDollar(): handle #, %, and / by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​288](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/288)
- Ignore no docker configuration found error by [@​zhujian7](https://redirect.github.com/zhujian7) in [#​290](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/290)
- Tweak ARG processing, particularly for BUILD... and TARGET... by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​289](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/289)

#### New Contributors

- [@​zhujian7](https://redirect.github.com/zhujian7) made their first contribution in [#​290](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/290)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.11...v1.2.12>

### [`v1.2.11`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.11)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.10...v1.2.11)

#### What's Changed

- dispatcher: honor heading args while processing FROM --platform by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​286](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/286)

### [`v1.2.9`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.9)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.8...v1.2.9)

#### What's Changed

- healthcheck: add support for `--start-interval` by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​280](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/280)
- Don't expand RUN heredocs ourselves, let the shell do it by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​281](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/281)

### [`v1.2.8`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.8)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.7...v1.2.8)

#### What's Changed

- healthcheck: add --start-interval by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​280](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/280)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.7...v1.2.8>

### [`v1.2.7`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.7)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.6...v1.2.7)

#### What's Changed

- Bump google.golang.org/protobuf from v1.31.0 to v1.33.0, which should fix CVE-2024-24786.
- Bump github.com/docker/docker from v25.0.1 to v26.0.0, which should fix CVE-2024-24557 and CVE-2024-29018.

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.6...v1.2.7>

### [`v1.2.6`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.6)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.5...v1.2.6)

#### What's Changed

- RUN-1833: dockerclient: use /bin/sleep for idling instead of sleep by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​256](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/256)
- Bump dependencies by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​259](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/259)
- dockerfile/parser: use custom 2mb buffer for long-texts  by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​261](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/261)
- build(deps): bump google.golang.org/grpc from 1.53.0 to 1.56.3 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [#​266](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/266)
- build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker from 24.0.2+incompatible to 24.0.7+incompatible by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [#​267](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/267)
- builder,dispatcher: Parse ADD --checksum by [@​jfroy](https://redirect.github.com/jfroy) in [#​265](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/265)
- Containerfile: Add `heredoc` support for `RUN`, `COPY` and `ADD` by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​264](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/264)
- build(deps): bump github.com/moby/buildkit from 0.10.6 to 0.11.4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [#​271](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/271)
- Complain when --checksum/--chown/--from/--mount/--network get empty args by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​270](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/270)
- Bump dependencies by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​269](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/269)
- Stages.ByName/ByTarget/ThroughTarget: accept numbers by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​275](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/275)
- bump github.com/containerd/containerd by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​273](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/273)
- TestDispatchFromFlagsAndUseBuiltInArgs: expect variants to be used by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​272](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/272)
- Update dependencies, keep up with API changes by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​276](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/276)

#### New Contributors

- [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) made their first contribution in [#​266](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/266)
- [@​jfroy](https://redirect.github.com/jfroy) made their first contribution in [#​265](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/265)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.5...v1.2.6>

### [`v1.2.5`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.4...v1.2.5)

#### What's Changed

- chore(docs): 2 small updates to README by [@​jhult](https://redirect.github.com/jhult) in [#​253](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/253)
- Update dependencies by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​254](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/254)

#### New Contributors

- [@​jhult](https://redirect.github.com/jhult) made their first contribution in [#​253](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/253)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.4...v1.2.5>

### [`v1.2.4`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.3...v1.2.4)

#### What's Changed

- dispatcher: honor default builtin-args while processing `FROM --platform=` by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​224](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/224)
- conformance: test non-root USER before WORKDIR by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​222](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/222)
- dispatcher: consider `builtinargs` and `userargs` while processing `baseImage` name by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​229](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/229)
- dockerclient: fix COPYing an archive to a new location by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​233](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/233)
- dispatcher, builder: filter `args` against `allowedArgs` while processing `FROM`, `ADD` and `RUN` by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​232](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/232)
- add,copy: fix error message expecting at least two arguments by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​236](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/236)
- system: use `containers/storage` for `LCOW` validation by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​246](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/246)
- Bump to Go 1.19 by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​245](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/245)
- Switch to golang native error wrapping by [@​saschagrunert](https://redirect.github.com/saschagrunert) in [#​240](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/240)
- Use containers/storage/pkg/regexp to better handle init regex by [@​rhatdan](https://redirect.github.com/rhatdan) in [#​239](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/239)
- TestBuilder(): be able to expect errors by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​244](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/244)
- dockerclient: implement COPY --chmod by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​249](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/249)
- dockerclient: don't quietly ignore --mount by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​248](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/248)
- env,unset: support syntax `${VAR_NAME:?}` to error on unset vars by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​243](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/243)
- builder,dispatcher: support inline `--network` in RUN statements by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​247](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/247)

#### New Contributors

- [@​saschagrunert](https://redirect.github.com/saschagrunert) made their first contribution in [#​240](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/240)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.3...v1.2.4>

### [`v1.2.3`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.2...v1.2.3)

#### What's Changed

- Bump to v1.2.2 by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​217](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/217)
- dockerclient: fix case where COPY --from matches a file via a wildcard by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​218](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/218)
- builder: create WORKDIR with USER ownership by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [#​219](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/219)

#### New Contributors

- [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) made their first contribution in [#​219](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/219)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.2...v1.2.3>

### [`v1.2.2`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2)

#### What's Changed

- Add mounts to dispatch run by [@​ashley-cui](https://redirect.github.com/ashley-cui) in [#​193](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/193)
- Migrate to Go modules by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​196](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/196)
- Handle COPY --from=${number} by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​195](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/195)
- archiveFromDisk: inline archives that are being ADDed by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​198](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/198)
- dockerclient COPY --from: go back and copy skipped hard link targets by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​203](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/203)
- calcCopyInfo: also trim leading path on rootPath by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​204](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/204)
- Authenticate to registries when pulling images by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​206](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/206)
- Avoid panic when writing UIDs/GIDs > 0x1fffff by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​205](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/205)
- COPY --chown: add missing parent directories by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​207](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/207)
- Update all dependencies and Travis configuration by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​208](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/208)
- ARG: allows to process multiple `ARGS` in single step by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​210](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/210)
- dockerclient.ClientExecutor.Stages(): commit base stages by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​211](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/211)
- dockerclient: always use force=true when removing images by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​213](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/213)
- dockerclient: tighten up cleanup logic by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​214](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/214)
- dispatcher: Parse `--platform` via `FROM --platform=` and assign to field in stage's Builder by [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) in [#​212](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/212)
- dockerclient: COPY --from should ignore the source's WORKDIR by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​215](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/215)
- dockerclient: copying a directory from another stage should discard perms by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [#​216](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/216)

#### New Contributors

- [@​ashley-cui](https://redirect.github.com/ashley-cui) made their first contribution in [#​193](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/193)
- [@​flouthoc](https://redirect.github.com/flouthoc) made their first contribution in [#​210](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/210)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2>

### [`v1.2.1`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1)

- COPY: treat absolute source paths as being relative to the contextdir ([#​191](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/191))
- COPY: treat sources named "" as "\*" ([#​181](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/181)/[#​190](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/190))
- dockerclient/testdata/copychown/Dockerfile: remove an irrelevant instruction ([#​189](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/189))
- dockerclient: implement --chown for ADD/COPY ([#​187](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/187)/[#​188](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/188))
- README.txt: correct the suggested invocation for conformance tests ([#​185](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/185))

### [`v1.2.0`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.8...v1.2.0)

Review fixes: checkChmod + tests reworked
Additional condition for chmod + tests
Ignore begining or trailing '/' in ignore line
Add chmod handling to COPY/ADD with ut
Support .containerignore as well as .dockerignore
ADD: add another conformance test

### [`v1.1.8`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.8)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.7...v1.1.8)

- Flag errors on more quoting errors
- ADD: extract local archives
- Support comments in .dockerignore

### [`v1.1.7`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.7)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.6...v1.1.7)

- Dockerfile/parser: Export node.Endline
- Deduplicate environment variables
- Update conformance tests

### [`v1.1.6`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.6)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.5...v1.1.6)

Handle args with multiple equal signs

### [`v1.1.5`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.4...v1.1.5)

Adjust argument slice size in builder
Handle ARG and ENV with duplicate name on RUN
Allow Args to be used in Variable Evaluation
archiveMapper.Filter: also map hard link target names
add dockerclient/testdata/Dockerfile.noworkdir

### [`v1.1.4`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.3...v1.1.4)

Make imagebuilder's argument handling mirror "docker build"

### [`v1.1.3`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.2...v1.1.3)

archiveFromContainer(): return possibly-wrapped os.IsNotError
Fix error output in archive.go

### [`v1.1.2`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2)

Add tests to verify copy and add with environment substitution.
Process env substitution in ADD, COPY commands
dockerclient: detect ENOENT when copying
NewBuilder(): always initialize Args

### [`v1.1.1`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.1.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1)

Add env to stage
Use imported constants instead of our own
dockerclient newArchiveMapper: always end archiveRoot with "/"
conformance: test COPY --from with a symlink as the source dir
README: Add podman specific note
Migrate from glog to klog
vndr bump

</details>

---

### Configuration

📅 **Schedule**: Branch creation - At any time (no schedule defined), Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined).
